source_note: Draw positions, June 2026 ranking inputs, fixtures, and results are a checked-in prospective tournament snapshot. Results must be updated without rewriting prior forecasts. information_cutoff corrected 2026-06-13: it previously read 2026-06-14T18:00:00Z, a future-dated cutoff that predated its own generation and caused already-played June 12 local-date fixtures to be forecast as upcoming (see predictions/INTEGRITY_NOTES.md). The cutoff now follows completion of the June 12 matches in UTC while preceding the June 13 matchday.
